lastUpdatedNote: PR #70 merged — mid-session bug-triage pivot from Phase 6 sprint. Admin dashboard 'Clear Scanning Data' button hit RTDB's WRITE_TOO_BIG (~16 MB) limit on a grown /scanningData node. Operator unblocked today via firebase database:remove /scanningData CLI. PR #70 shipped the durable fix: migrated clearScanningData from broken onRequest + httpsCallable-shape-mismatch to v2 onCall + chunked-delete (500/batch, 100K/call cap, client loops for larger nodes). Also dropped tempClearData (hardcoded 2024 secret, same WRITE_TOO_BIG bug, same file/concern per fold-in scope rule). Deployed + smoke-tested before merge. Phase 6 sprint: 2 items remaining (concierge home active-run surfacing + Compliance Sweep stretch).

sprint.goal: Effective implementation of Hi-Fi v2, with ROSS as the central post-login surface for every subscribed user
sprint.summary: Concierge-first IA. v1 admin tabs reframed as 'Ross's playbook' — the rules and procedures the future AI agent runs against. Phase 5 closed 2026-05-11 with all five cleanup PRs merged: ROSS is the post-login destination end-to-end. Phase 6 in progress: PRs 1A/1B/1C/2 shipped (tier-gating mechanism + curated 5/8 split + locked-card upsell UX + day-zero seed). Workflows are the product; v1 modules become workflow step types over time. Two tiers only: Free (full UI + 5 starter templates), All-in (full library). Next: operator-facing Run execution UI, then concierge home active-run surfacing.

phases.summary: All Phase 4 tasks merged: 4a Playbook (PRs #21/#24), 4b Activity (#23), 4c People CRUD (#25), 4d.1 Workflow editor (#28), 4d.2 Template CRUD superAdmin (#30), 4e.1 Per-task input-type editor (#32), 4e.2 Subtask→task propagation + template-level inputType editor (#35). All v2 admin tabs are flag-ON behind /ross.html and edit-capable end-to-end.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — central-funnel cleanup
phases.summary: Closed 2026-05-11. Five PRs all merged: post-login router (#39), signup v2 Hi-Fi + dynamic tier writes (#42), homepage v2 Hi-Fi + reused public hello (#44), router rollout + drop wizard for fresh signups (#46, PR 4 + PR 6 folded), ROSS sidebar cleanup (#48). ROSS is now the post-login destination end-to-end.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — playbook UX enrichment + template library curation
phases.summary: Active sprint. PR 1A (#51) shipped the tier-gating mechanism. PR 1B (#53) curated the 5 Free / 8 All-in split. PR 1C (#55) shipped the locked-card upsell UX + /upgrade.html. PR 2 (#58, 2026-05-12) shipped day-zero auto-activation — new rossSeedFirstWorkflow CF, called from signup-service.js after both signup paths; RTDB pointer ross/config/firstWorkflowTemplateId drives template selection. Originally inlined inside registerUser; preview testing exposed that the callable has been throwing unauthenticated on every call (v1-vs-v2 signature bug from firebase-functions v7), and signup-service.js silently falls back — required mid-PR architecture pivot to a dedicated CF. Next: operator-facing Run execution UI for all 10 inputTypes, then concierge home cards driven by real activated workflows. The Runs server surface is already shipped. Vocabulary per public/kb/features/ROSS.md: Templates → Workflows → Tasks → Runs.

phases.name: ROSS v2 — askRoss (LLM)
phases.summary: Separate sprint. Anthropic-backed rossChat CF + eval harness + cost cap + web-sourced day-zero findings (weather, local events, holidays, suburb demographics).

bugs.title: Other 7 v1 callables in functions/index.js share the same Gen-2 signature bug (getQMSTierInfo, getQMSUsageStats, validateQMSFeatureAccess, validateQMSWhatsAppIntegration, performanceTest, runSystemOptimization, getSystemMetrics)
bugs.notes: All seven still use functions.https.onCall((data, context) => ...) and will throw unauthenticated on every call (same Gen-2 vs v1 signature mismatch fixed for registerUser in PR #67). Audit findings: two QMS callables show no recent invocations; the other five had logs-API errors on the audit pass. Consumer audit (public/): performanceTest has a working HTTP fallback (performanceTestHTTP); runSystemOptimization called only from admin-internal firebase-performance-monitor.js; QMS callables have no public/ consumers. None on user-facing critical path. Fix: same mechanical migration as PR #67 — onCall((request) => { const { data, auth } = request; ... }) with HttpsError from firebase-functions/v2/https. Recommend one sweep PR addressing all seven at once for consistent diff + single deploy.

bugs.title: Mobile nav missing Playbook/Activity/People access on ROSS home
bugs.notes: Operator flagged on PR #58 preview that the Ross home mobile bottom-nav doesn't expose the three governance destinations from the desktop sidebar. PR #48 noted the mobile topbar was supposed to fold them in. Either pre-existing on master or regression since PR #48. Investigation needed before fix.

bugs.title: Double-seed race on signup retry — rossSeedFirstWorkflow idempotency pre-check is not transactional
bugs.notes: A user double-clicking signup or hitting a network retry could pass the firstWorkflowSeededAt pre-check in both invocations and produce two seeded workflows. Mitigation options: (a) RTDB transaction() on the marker, OR (b) deterministic workflow ID per uid (e.g. seed_{uid}) so duplicate write is overwrite. Exposure small; consequence mild (duplicate workflow, no corruption).

bugs.title: feature-access-control.js:64 — dynamic import with ?v=${Date.now()} cache-buster breaks Vite build-time analysis
bugs.notes: Vite can't statically analyse a runtime-computed path — throws `Unknown variable dynamic import` on every checkFeatureAccess call post-build. Fix is one line (drop the ?v=…; Vite content-hashes outputs natively) but the file is shared infra. Needs own focused PR with consumer audit.
